qa_pair.question: Using the cstack tools, how many distinct agents are defined in the operating system's swarm?
What group does the agent named "investigate" belong to?
How many Iron Laws are listed in the operating law (AGENTS.md)?
Which single file is the website-keeper agent permitted to edit?
In the responsive doctrine, at what pixel width is the chrome mobile/desktop boundary set (the value used by the "dt" breakpoint)?
Which agent is responsible for picking a third-party API from a curated index before any integration code is written?
The build-agent runs a four-stage pre-deploy gate in order (typecheck, lint, test, build). What is the third stage?
Which business-engine agent is dedicated to follow-up sequences and must never auto-send?
According to Iron Law #1 (no fix without root cause), after how many failed hypotheses should the investigator stop and escalate?
What is the maximum recommended line count for AGENTS.md stated in the operating law?
